obligations.rule: The function must reject strings that are not valid FQDNs under default options.
obligations.why: Baseline requirement from README: validate FQDNs with default options.

obligations.rule: The function must allow FQDNs without TLDs when `require_tld` is false.
obligations.why: README specifies `require_tld` as an option to disable TLD validation.

obligations.rule: The function must allow underscores in domain parts when `allow_underscores` is true.
obligations.why: README specifies `allow_underscores` as an option to permit underscores.

obligations.rule: The function must allow trailing dots when `allow_trailing_dot` is true.
obligations.why: README specifies `allow_trailing_dot` as an option to permit trailing dots.

obligations.rule: The function must allow numeric TLDs when `allow_numeric_tld` is true.
obligations.why: README specifies `allow_numeric_tld` as an option to permit numeric TLDs.

obligations.rule: The function must allow wildcard domains when `allow_wildcard` is true.
obligations.why: README specifies `allow_wildcard` as an option to permit wildcard domains.

obligations.rule: The function must ignore max length constraints when `ignore_max_length` is true.
obligations.why: README specifies `ignore_max_length` as an option to bypass length validation.

test_groups.title: Default validation behavior
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior of the validator, ensuring it rejects invalid FQDNs and accepts valid ones.

test_groups.title: Validation with require_tld set to false
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when TLD validation is disabled, allowing FQDNs without TLDs.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_underscores set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when underscores are allowed in domain parts.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_trailing_dot set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when trailing dots are allowed in FQDNs.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_numeric_tld set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when numeric TLDs are allowed.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_wildcard set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when wildcard domains are allowed.

test_groups.title: Validation with ignore_max_length set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when max length constraints are ignored.
